    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ActionSlot
    Represents non-land action slots (Chance, Community Chest, Tax, Jail, etc.).
    Board
    Represents the game board with 40 slots.
    Dice
    Handles dice rolling with values from 1 to 10.
    Game
    Central class that manages the entire Monopoly game state.
    GameController
    Main controller responsible for all core gameplay logic.
    GameEditorController
    Controller for the hidden Game Editor.
    GameEditorDialog
    Hidden Game Editor dialog (Easter Egg).
    GameView
    The main graphical user interface for the Monopoly game.
    GameView.TradeRequest
     
    GoSlot
    Represents the GO slot.
    LandSlot
    Represents a purchasable land property on the board.
    Main
     
    Player
    Represents one player in the game.
    Slot
    Abstract base class for all slots on the board.
